operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Israeli Airstrikes Kill 4+ in Gaza; First Municipal Elections in 20+ Years Held in Deir al-Balah
heroSubtitle: New wave of Israeli airstrikes kills 4+ Palestinians on Apr 26; Gaza holds first local elections in 20+ years in Deir al-Balah; ceasefire Phase 2 talks remain deadlocked over Hamas disarmament; death toll rises to 72,587+; UN Security Council calls to consolidate ceasefire and halt escalating violence
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,587+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Apr 26, 2026). 800+ killed since Oct 10, 2025 ceasefire framework. 2,400+ ceasefire violations documented by Gaza GMO. ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UN High Commissioner Türk: Palestinians across Gaza unsafe six months after ceasefire announcement (Apr 25, 2026). UN Women (Apr 25, 2026): 38,000+ women and girls killed Oct 2023–Dec 2025 (avg. 47/day). EU-UN Joint Recovery and Reconstruction Assessment (Apr 21, 2026): $71.4B needed over 10 years; $35.2B infrastructure damage; 371,888 housing units damaged/destroyed; human development set back 77 years. OCHA Apr 23 report: aid pallets improving (17,400/week Apr 14–20) but still 37% of required levels. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, only 9.7% funded. Gaza holds first municipal elections in 20+ years in Deir al-Balah (Apr 25–26, 2026); ceasefire Phase 2 talks deadlocked over Hamas disarmament demands vs. full Israeli withdrawal.
